purpose: One row per candidate patch_op->native_op promotion (PLAN.md PART 2 sec 2.0 'three promotion axes'). tools/promote_op.py reads this file and atomically applies Axis A (config/operations.v2.json operations[].policy.status_policy flip) + Axis B (the owning tools/patch_ops/<family>.py module's WRITE_OP_MAP entry + build_job_args arg-branch) for a row -- REFUSING the whole promotion unless F1 (measure/reachable_matrix.jsonl) marks native_op RUNNABLE, never RUNNABLE_BUT_DEGENERATE or unprobed. Axis C (C++ reachability) needs no file edit from this tool: F1's live probe already exercises the same AriadneNativeJob.cpp dispatch chain a RUNNABLE verdict implies is already reachable (PLAN.md PART 2 sec 2.0 Axis-C note: 'already ON for the simple entity/annotation/solid create families').

row_schema.native_op: config/operations.v2.json operations[].id this patch_op dispatches to.
row_schema.arg_keys: ordered list of args[] keys build_job_args copies through verbatim (matches tools/patch_ops/entities.py's existing branches: 'if k in args: out[k] = args[k]').
row_schema.ir_kind: the IR entity geometry.kind this patch_op regenerates from (ir_to_patch.build_patch_from_ir / patch_ops.ir_op_for), or null for a record-level (non-entity) op with no ir_to_patch builder case yet -- tools/promote_op.py does not generate ir_op_for wiring, only WRITE_OP_MAP + build_job_args (PLAN.md F2 node text).
row_schema.persistence_class: PLAN.md PART 1 sec 1.4 class: P (geometry, diff target = geometry-diff=0) | D (persistent-non-geometry record, diff target = record-diff=0) | R (read/compute) | L (live/non-persistent).
row_schema.risk: low | medium | high -- H2/H4 risk-sequencing tier, informational only; tools/promote_op.py does not gate on this field (tools/reconcile_native_registry.py's F8 coverage gate does).
row_schema.family: optional override for which tools/patch_ops/<family>.py module owns this promotion (entities|blocks|tables|db). Omit to let promote_op.infer_family() derive it from native_op's prefix.
row_schema.state: informational only (not read by tools/promote_op.py): already_promoted | pending_f1.
row_schema.notes: free-text rationale / PLAN.md cross-reference for this row.

rows.notes: F9-merged control row -- tools/patch_ops/entities.py already carries this exact map-entry + arg-branch and config/operations.v2.json#write.entity.line is already policy.status_policy=implemented; promote_op reports ALREADY_PROMOTED (idempotent no-op), never re-edits the file. Exercised by F2's own tests against the REAL repo files (read-only; compute_promotion never writes).

PLAN.md Tier 1 T1.1 (WAVE-0 exit gate M-A / TIER 1 table). config/operations.v2.json#write.block.simple_create is already policy.status_policy=implemented (Axis A pre-satisfied) but measure/reachable_matrix.jsonl carries no row for it yet -- F1 has not live-probed it, so the Axis-A gate REJECTS until a live F1 sweep classifies it RUNNABLE. tools/patch_ops/blocks.py's WRITE_OP_MAP is still empty for this op_id (Axis B not yet wired).

PLAN.md Tier 1 T1.3. Same F1-unprobed gate closure as create_block_def; family=db per tools/patch_ops/db.py's own docstring (catch-all for a database/transform op with no entities/blocks/tables home).
PLAN.md Tier 1 T1.4 (H-9: proves the write path only, not xdata SOURCE fidelity -- source resbuf_json is NULL until a T5 cross-cutting extraction node).

WAVE-1 TIER-1 T1. F1 (measure/reachable_matrix.jsonl) classifies write.entity.arc RUNNABLE (valid_arg_probe; native handler src/Ariadne.AcadNative/families/m08g_handlers.inc m08gDispatch, AcDbArc(center,radius,startAng,endAng)). risk=medium: input_validated=false (empty_arg_probe silently builds a default-radius/full-sweep arc instead of erroring) -- not a promotion blocker, but callers must supply real args to avoid a degenerate create.

WAVE-1 TIER-1 T1. F1 classifies write.entity.ellipse RUNNABLE (valid_arg_probe; m08g_handlers.inc AcDbEllipse(center,normal,major,ratio,sa,ea)). risk=medium: input_validated=false (same silent-default-on-empty-args shape as create_arc).

WAVE-1 TIER-1 T1. F1 classifies write.entity.mpolygon RUNNABLE (m08g_handlers.inc AcDbMPolygon, hatch-backed closed polygon; m08gRead2dVertices reads 'vertices' then falls back to 'points', matching tools/fixture_foundry.py's mpolygon fixture args shape). ir_kind=null: 'mpolygon' is not in ir_builder._EXTRACT_KIND_TO_IR_KIND (no IR entity ever carries geometry.kind=='mpolygon' today), so no ir_to_patch case is wired -- Axis A/B only, honestly deferred on the read/IR side until an extraction ticket lands it.

WAVE-1 TIER-1 T1. F1 classifies write.entity.mtext RUNNABLE (valid_arg_probe; m08h_handlers.inc m08hDispatch, AcDbMText::setContents/setLocation/setTextHeight). risk=medium: input_validated=false (empty_arg_probe still creates an empty-content MText).

WAVE-1 TIER-1 T1. F1 classifies write.entity.text RUNNABLE (valid_arg_probe; m08h_handlers.inc AcDbText + setTextString/setPosition/setHeight). risk=medium: input_validated=false (same silent-default-on-empty shape as create_mtext). ir_to_patch case (kind=='text' -> 'create_text') already forward-declared in patch_ops.entities.ir_op_for pre-F2; this row only completes Axis A/B.

WAVE-1 TIER-1 T1. F1 classifies write.entity.polyline RUNNABLE (valid_arg_probe; input_validated=true -- empty_arg_probe correctly MISSING_ARGs on <2 points, m08g_handlers.inc AcDbPolyline::addVertexAt). native op also accepts 'write.entity.polyline2d' as an alias (same handler); ir_kind='lwpolyline' is the IR-side name (ir_builder._EXTRACT_KIND_TO_IR_KIND) -- ir_to_patch case (kind in ('lwpolyline','polyline') -> 'create_polyline') already forward-declared in patch_ops.entities.ir_op_for pre-F2; this row only completes Axis A/B.

WAVE-1 TIER-1 T1. F1 classifies write.entity.dim.rotated RUNNABLE (valid_arg_probe; input_validated=true -- empty_arg_probe correctly MISSING_ARGs without xline1/xline2/dim_line, m08h_handlers.inc AcDbRotatedDimension). ir_to_patch case (kind=='dimension', gated on xline1_point/xline2_point/dim_line_point all present -> 'create_dimension') already forward-declared in patch_ops.entities.ir_op_for (Tier 3) pre-F2; this row only completes Axis A/B.

WAVE-1 TIER-1 T1. F1 classifies write.entity.set_xdata RUNNABLE. Distinct native_op from the pre-existing 'set_xdata' patch_op (which targets write.xdata.set) -- named set_entity_xdata to avoid a patch_op collision; same (app,value) arg shape. Current m08e_handlers.inc handler (m08eHandleEntitySetXdata) calls setDatabaseXdata(pDb,...) inside an AriadneStagedWriteTransaction that is always rolled back (result.staged_rolled_back=true) -- proves the write path only, matching the existing set_xdata row's H-9 caveat, not per-entity handle-scoped xdata yet. ir_kind=null: record-level, no ir_to_patch case (same pattern as set_xdata/set_xrecord).
